TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Whitey_Bell, title = Whitey_Bell, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Whitey_Bell} }

S.FORM: Whitey Bell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1932, ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 9, Whitey Bell, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Whitey Bell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1932, ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 9, Whitey Bell, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: wħitej βell s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, wħitej βell, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
